moves.name: Puff Slash
moves.description: Quick slash with a chance to Blind.

moves.name: Pounce
moves.description: Hits harder if the target is slower.

moves.name: Dazzle
moves.description: May Blind the whole hero team.

moves.name: Sucker Vine
moves.description: Deals damage and heals self for 20% of it.

moves.name: Gloom Drip
moves.description: Hits harder if the hero is buffed.

moves.name: Body Block
moves.description: Forces heroes to target Barkhide for 1 turn.

moves.name: Cutlass Cut
moves.description: Hits harder if the hero is debuffed.

moves.name: Pop Quiz
moves.description: Forces a hero to lose their next action.

moves.description: Grants Guard to the enemy team.

moves.name: Snooze Field
moves.description: Each hero may lose their action.

moves.description: Forces a hero to lose their next action.

moves.name: Sneak Strike
moves.description: Hits harder if the hero is buffed.

moves.name: Door Shield
moves.description: Grants Guard to enemy team for 1 turn.

moves.description: Grants Guard to enemy team for 1 turn.

moves.description: Hits harder if the hero is debuffed.
